meta.title: Chief Operating Officer John Walters discussed Mexican drug cartels on Fox News
meta.description: Hudson Institute COO and Executive Vice President John Walters joined Fox News on December 28, 2011 to discuss Mexican drug cartels. Mexican authorities suspect a drug cartel may have laced sausages served at a rehab center with cyanide.
